name: Sesame Wonton Chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 2 teaspoons of sesame oil with salt to taste.
2. Place the wonton wrapper halves in a single layer on lightly oiled baking sheets.
3. Use your finger or a small, flexible brush to coat the surface of each wrapper with the sesame oil mixture.
4. Bake at 375°F until deeply browned, about 8 to 10 minutes.
5. Allow them to cool completely before serving.
6. These can be made several days in advance and stored at room temperature in an airtight container.
